task_completion.description: Navigate to the user creation or invitation page in FreeScout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A FreeScout page titled 'New User', 'Invite User', or a similar form with fields for user details is visible.
The text 'Rebecca' is visible inside the 'First Name' input field.
The text 'Fleming' is visible inside the 'Last Name' input field.
The text 'rebecca.fleming@helpdesk.local' is visible inside the 'Email' input field.
The 'Role' dropdown or selection is set to 'User' (not Administrator or other roles).
A success notification (e.g., 'User created', 'Invite sent') is visible, or 'Rebecca Fleming' is listed in the FreeScout users list.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the FreeScout web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser displaying the FreeScout application, not a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a database client to insert the user.
integrity.visual_evidence: No database management tools (like phpMyAdmin, DBeaver, or terminal SQL commands) are visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent actually typed into the application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are entered into the actual FreeScout form fields, not written in a separate text editor or notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected First Name: 'Rebecca'. Expected Last Name: 'Fleming'. Expected Email: 'rebecca.fleming@helpdesk.local'. Expected Role: 'User'.
